use_cases: SaaS product landing pages showcasing growth metrics
E-commerce hero sections with animated product showcases
Marketing pages for creator tools and digital products
Portfolio or media site hero sections with animated galleries
ai_summary: A responsive hero section component featuring an animated image gallery with staggered text and image animations powered by Framer Motion. The component supports customizable brand names, dual description paragraphs, CTA buttons, and integrates with shadcn's theming system for seamless light/dark mode support. Designed for growth-focused landing pages requiring engaging visual storytelling.
